caption: A man with grey, upright hair and glasses is seen recording a podcast in a room decorated with posters. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with suspenders, a red tie, and over-the-ear headphones. He sits behind a black microphone on a stand. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "#REAL TALK PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "REAL TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. He starts with his hands lowered, then lifts them to clap or emphasize a point, and finally begins to lower them again. The background remains static, featuring a wall with a framed shield icon and several other posters, including one that says "UNIQUE FASHION".
